recentTweets.text:
Why do Democrats want to keep foreign pedophiles in the United States?

Thank you, @SecRubio, for enforcing our laws while Democrats continue defending those who break them.

SCOTUS is allowing American citizenship to be given out and advertised to foreign nationals who hate us.

We don’t want billboard Americans, anchor babies, or birth tourists.

Pass my Anchors Away bill and ban these pregnant foreign women from birthing communists in our https://t.co/KlvTBCxC3P

The Senate needs to get BACK to DC and codify the border security agenda of the American people. 

Cancel August recess. https://t.co/RaQ17r1osp

The writer of the 14th Amendment said birthright citizenship for foreigners was nowhere in the Constitution.

I will not let SCOTUS write immigration law, and I will not sit by while American citizenship is passed around frivolously by aliens who hate us.

My Anchors Away Act can https://t.co/p9FAP08vaI

Congress must IMMEDIATELY cut off funding to any state or locality that enables or profits from birth tourism.

Foreigners are bypassing President Trump’s secure border by flying here to give birth and obtain American citizenship for their children.

My Anchors Away Act will ban

The Franklin Soccer Coach who drugged and raped young boys in OUR community was just sentenced to 30 years in prison. Thank you, @DHSgov, @TheJusticeDept and President Trump, for fighting for the harshest sentence for this sicko.

Turns out he is an ILLEGAL ALIEN from Mexico.

President Trump is right. Anchor babies should not be allowed to steal our country via birthright citizenship.

That’s why I introduced the Anchors Away Act the minute SCOTUS put foreigners over Americans. 

US citizenship is NOT for sale. Rehear the case. https://t.co/X3wyNGdw3k

https://t.co/fNZGutBlar It’s been 8 days since SCOTUS put birth tourists over Americans.

Every day that goes by is another day foreign nationals, antithetical to our values, can vote in our elections and run for our offices.

Congress needs to pass my Anchors Away Act and get

Communists have had their sights set on America for generations.

Democrats want to hand our country over to the radical left, let noncitizens vote, and reward birthright citizenship abuse.

The Senate must get back in session and vote on the bills the American people demanded. https://t.co/o37VbO54KS
Pray for the National Guard in Memphis. They are restoring law and order, and they deserve our support.

SCOTUS does not have the power to subvert the will of the people.

Congress can shut down birthright citizenship, and we will take back our country. https://t.co/Z92MAdlL0C

Congress has the power to deport Mamdani and stop the communist revolution taking root in our cities because of America’s broken immigration system.

We are done with America’s lax immigration policies.

Pass the REMIGRATION Act. https://t.co/KP0J1dspgV

I will always keep my promises to Tennesseans. 

Representing my state this Independence Day was a profound honor. Happy 250, America! https://t.co/0AHloBx6Sg

One Nation, One People, under God. 

Happy Fourth of July. https://t.co/9GIYB3NwSB
My Fourth of July message to the Senate and @LeaderJohnThune. https://t.co/u2KW9BrZrK

Adversaries from around the world have spent generations timing pregnancies to create American citizens whose allegiance lies with foreign nations, not the United States.

Now they’re running for our political offices.

No more pregnant aliens entering this country. We have a

CNN is FUMING that my Anchors Away Act will ban birth tourism and pregnant foreigners from stealing U.S. citizenship for their children, and ultimately, themselves.

The Left knows ending birthright citizenship will massively shrink their voter base.

TOO BAD, the aliens have to https://t.co/CQOhqINinw
I will not stand by and let our country get colonized by anchor babies or birth tourists. It's time to drop the ANCHOR and take our country back.

We are done bringing foreign women into this country to give birth to Democratic Socialists.

My Anchors Away Act will ban birth tourism and SHUT DOWN birthright citizenship. https://t.co/E4BvUQjXAf

Democratic Socialist Melat Kiros just won the Democratic nomination in Colorado’s First Congressional District.

She blames America for 9/11, wants to abolish ICE, and supports amnesty for every illegal alien.

Her own website admits she’s an anchor baby.  If Congress passes my https://t.co/iDqSiCDgGA

I’m with @CarlHigbie.

The authors of the 14th Amendment made it pretty clear: birthright citizenship is NOT in the text of the Amendment.

It does not take a law degree to figure that out.

SCOTUS failed. Congress must act. Anchors Away! https://t.co/VokzC9io0V
REMIGRATION must be America’s future.

I will not allow SCOTUS to denigrate American sovereignty. 

Congress can overrule their decision by passing my Anchors Away Act. 

Anchors Away!

SCOTUS betrayed America. 

It's time to bar pregnant foreigners from coming to this country. We are being colonized. 

Anchors Away! https://t.co/uBQ0Tduy7A

Today’s United States Supreme Court decision is not only a betrayal of American sovereignty, but a direct attack on our national security.

Because of birthright citizenship, foreigners are being born on our soil, groomed by communists and globalists, and embedded into our https://t.co/j5x9vwMalq

🚨GREAT NEWS: The Supreme Court has rightly ruled that transgenders do not belong in women’s sports. 

Common sense has WON. 

American families FIRST! https://t.co/E5wTgBXiRo

I convened a roundtable with local Tennessee business leaders and Acting Secretary of Labor Keith Sonderling for a great conversation on bringing manufacturing jobs BACK to Tennessee and driving innovation across every industry.

Tennessee is LEADING.

Thank you to Columbia State https://t.co/zf56FVyLia
SAVE America Act NOW. https://t.co/wFoOB5qRIg

The REMIGRATION Act is how we send Mamdani home. 

The bill’s retroactive denaturalization provision will undo the replacement migration of the last decade. https://t.co/iSzJTnEk7m

ASSIMILATION Act: Repeal Hart-Celler and fix the immigration system.

REMIGRATION Act: Mass denaturalization and immediate removal of aliens.

Result: Swift exportation of millions of aliens and the restoration of American culture. https://t.co/H7226sIl0y

My Remigration Act will deploy USCIS to supercharge denaturalizations and review the paperwork of every alien who entered under Joe Biden.

Mass deportations are the people’s mandate, and we must deliver. https://t.co/4bY9yYpQ4k

Any Senator who REFUSES to vote for the SAVE America Act should resign immediately. 

They are not qualified for that job. https://t.co/z3WYKqIMBz

Illegal aliens are helping put anti-Christian communists into power, and we cannot allow them to take over this country.

The SAVE America Act, ASSIMILATION Act, and REMIGRATION Act are critical tools to stop the communist takeover of our elections.

The people demand action NOW. https://t.co/vK4Otiq6gq

Having Americans in America is NOT too much to ask. 

The American people are sick of fraudsters and terror supporters; they want patriots as their countrymen. 

Remigration is the future. https://t.co/4RuLNZtjvu

Having @GOPMajorityWhip as a cosponsor on my ASSIMILATION Act would be an honor. 

America First.

My Remigration Act would retroactively denaturalize anyone who lied on their N-400 immigration forms in the last decade. 

Zohran Mamdani may have done this in 2018. 

You're welcome, New York. https://t.co/r4uPi7zz1e
